backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the Hostel data types, sample hostel initialization, and CRUD operations for a hostel listing app with sponsorship support and visitor counting.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state by adding the `isSponsored` field (defaulting to false) to all existing hostels and initializing `visitorCount` to 0.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (AdBanner component, ad placements on Home/HostelDetail pages, sponsored hostel support, visitor tracking, advertise page) to their source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and recent changes of components, pages, hooks, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with comprehensive SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, PWA manifest link, geo tags, and JSON-LD structured data for the Hostel Addas site.
frontend/public/googlee7577b039261c25d.h: Google Search Console site verification file containing the verification token string.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest defining the app name, theme color, display mode, and icon for Hostel Addas.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers and pointing to the sitemap URL.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing the main pages of the Hostel Addas site with last-modified dates and change frequencies.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes including Home, HostelDetail, AddHostel, EditHostel, Privacy, Disclaimer, SeoGuide, Download, and Advertise.
frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx: Renders a placeholder advertisement banner in three configurable sizes (leaderboard, rectangle, banner) with a styled amber gradient and a data attribute for future ad network slot integration.
Collapsible filter panel that lets users filter hostels by price range and room sharing type (single through four-sharing), displaying an active filter count badge.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Renders a row of toggle buttons to filter hostels by category (All, Girls, Boys, Co-Living) with highlighted styling for the selected option.
frontend/src/components/HostelCard.tsx: Displays a single hostel as a clickable card with an image, category badge, sponsored indicator, price range, location, and contact info, navigating to the hostel detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/HostelGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of HostelCard components with loading spinner and empty-state fallback UI.
frontend/src/components/HostelMap.tsx: Displays hostels as color-coded markers on a custom canvas-style map of Hyderabad by normalizing lat/lng coordinates to percentage positions within a styled div, with a category legend.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Image gallery component with a large main view, previous/next navigation arrows, keyboard arrow-key support, and a scrollable thumbnail strip for multi-image browsing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component with a sticky header (navigation links, Add Hostel/Download/Advertise buttons), an Outlet for child routes, and a footer with visitor count, privacy/terms links, and social icons.
frontend/src/components/MapLocationPicke: Google Maps component that dynamically loads the Maps JS API, renders an interactive map centered on Hyderabad, and lets users pick a location via click, marker drag, or autocomplete search, calling onLocationSelect with address and coordinates.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Controlled search input component with a search icon and a clear (X) button, used for filtering hostels by name or address.
frontend/src/components/SeoInfoBanner.ts: Dismissible informational banner that guides site owners to submit their URL to Google Search Console for indexing, including a collapsible step-by-step guide; dismissed state is persisted in localStorage.
frontend/src/components/SortControls.tsx: Dropdown select component for sorting hostels by price, name, or location, exposing a SortOption type and calling onSortChange when the selection changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, and invalidates all non-actor queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useMutations.ts: Defines useAddHostel and useUpdateHostel React Query mutation hooks that call the backend actor to create or update a hostel and invalidate the relevant query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all hostels, hostels by category, a single hostel by ID, and the visitor count from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a warm color palette (terracotta, sage, amber) in both light and dark modes, including category-specific colors for girls, boys, and co-living hostels.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AddHostel.tsx: Form page for adding a new hostel listing, collecting name, category, description, address (with map picker), owner contact, image URLs, and room sharing options with per-tier pricing, then submitting via the useAddHostel mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Advertise.tsx: Marketing page for advertising on Hostel Addas, featuring a hero section, platform stats, ad banner examples, and contact options via WhatsApp and email.
frontend/src/pages/Disclaimer.tsx: Static legal disclaimer page outlining limitations of liability, user-generated content policy, third-party links, and no-professional-advice notice, with JSON-LD breadcrumb structured data.
frontend/src/pages/Download.tsx: PWA installation guide page with step-by-step instructions for adding Hostel Addas to the home screen on Android (Chrome) and iOS (Safari), plus a feature highlights section and JSON-LD breadcrumb markup.
frontend/src/pages/EditHostel.tsx: Edit page for updating an existing hostel's room sharing capacities and prices, loading current values from the backend via useGetHostel and submitting changes through the useUpdateHostel mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Main homepage component that fetches and displays hostel listings with category filtering, search, price range, sharing type filters, sort controls, a map view, ad banners, and session-based visit tracking.
frontend/src/pages/HostelDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single hostel showing an image gallery, room sharing/pricing options, amenities, map location, contact info, and ad banners, fetched by hostel ID from the route params.
frontend/src/pages/Privacy.tsx: Static privacy policy page covering data collection, usage, storage, user rights, and third-party services, with embedded JSON-LD breadcrumb structured data.
frontend/src/pages/SeoGuide.tsx: Step-by-step guide page explaining how to get the Hostel Addas site indexed and ranked on Google, including sitemap submission, structured data, and backlink tips, with breadcrumb JSON-LD.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (warm palette, category-specific colors), border radius, fonts, container settings, accordion animations, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state metadata (version 37) summarizing the hostel listing site's architecture, existing features, known issues (Google indexing, category filtering), and image requirements.
